name: Firm Knee Support Pillow - Threshold™
description:
Sleep more comfortable with this Firm Knee-Support Pillow from Threshold™. Featuring a curved shape, this white knee support pillow is designed to fit comfortably under the knees for back sleepers, helping to maintain a better posture. The cushioned interior provides firm support all night, and the machine-washable cover allows for easy cleaning.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
